419330.name: judicial_constr_vdem_owid
419330.description:
The variable denotes the best estimate of the extent to which the executive respects the constitution, complies with the judiciary and high courts, and higher and lower courts are independent.

It is based on the V-Dem variable v2x_jucon, and we expand it to cover more years for some countries.

The index reaches from 0 to 1 (most constrained).
419330.datasetName: Democracy - OWID based on Varieties of Democracy (v12) and Regimes of the World

source.name: OWID based on V-Dem (v12) and Lührmann et al. (2018)
source.dataPublishedBy: Our World in Data, Bastian Herre
source.dataPublisherSource: Data comes from the Varieties of Democracy project (v12), sometimes using Lührmann et al's (2018) Regimes of the World classification, and own expansions and refinements.
source.additionalInfo:
This dataset provides information on political regimes, using data from the Varieties of Democracy project (v11.1), and the Regimes of the World classification by Lührmann et al. (2018).

We expand the countries and years covered, and refine the coding of the Regimes of the World classification. You can read a detailed description of the data in this post: https://ourworldindata.org/regimes-of-the-world-data

You can download the code and complete dataset, including supplementary variables, from GitHub: https://github.com/owid/notebooks/tree/main/BastianHerre/political_regimes

419331.name: judicial_constr_vdem_low_owid
419331.description:
The variable denotes the lower-bound estimate of the extent to which the executive respects the constitution, complies with the judiciary and high courts, and higher and lower courts are independent.

It is based on the V-Dem variable v2x_jucon_codelow, and we expand it to cover more years for some countries.

The index reaches from 0 to 1 (most constrained).

419332.name: judicial_constr_vdem_high_owid
419332.description:
The variable denotes the upper-bound estimate of the extent to which the executive respects the constitution, complies with the judiciary and high courts, and higher and lower courts are independent.

It is based on the V-Dem variable v2x_jucon_codehigh, and we expand it to cover more years for some countries.

The index reaches from 0 to 1 (most constrained).
